title: Canton Police bodycam – Walmart loss prevention “gun jam” incident (Dec 2025)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Ohio Open Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

I request the full body-worn camera footage (and any in-car/dash camera, if applicable) from all responding/off-duty Canton Police Department officers related to the Walmart shoplifting incident in Canton, Ohio where a suspect attempted to shoot an off-duty officer in the loss prevention office and the firearm malfunctioned (“gun jam”). Please include footage from the start of the encounter through the conclusion of the incident, including the initial contact/interview in the loss prevention office, any physical confrontation, arrest, and transport.

Date range: December 18–22, 2025 (or the correct incident date within that range). Location: Walmart in Canton, Ohio (loss prevention office). Please provide the video in digital format (MP4 or similar) via electronic delivery. If any portion is withheld or redacted, please cite the legal basis for each redaction/withholding.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Unseen BodyCam Cases

communications.subject: Freedom of Information Act Request: Organ Pipe National Park Complaints
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

All complaints regarding Organ Pipe National Park received through the park's email portal from January 1, 2025 through February 23, 2026.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Dave Maass

communications.subject: Request Received by DOI FOIA Office
communications.communication:
Dear Dave  Maass, 
We would like to inform you that the Department of the Interior has received your NPS FOIA request and assigned it the control number DOI-2026-004128. Please reference this number in any future communications regarding your request. 

This message has been sent from an unattended email inbox. For any further correspondence, please contact the bureau at https://www.doi.gov/foia/contacts. 

Thank you for your attention to this matter.
Regards, 
DOI FOIA Office

title: Port Allen ICE detention communication (Mayor's Office)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Louisiana Public Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

Under the Louisiana Open Records Act, I am requesting an opportunity to obtain copies of public records relating to the property located at 2070 Commercial Dr, Port Allen, LA 70767.
Specifically, I am requesting the following records created, submitted, or received between January 1, 2025 and the date this request is processed:

All emails, text messages, memos, and calendar appointments sent or received by [Insert Specific Official's Name or "the Mayor's Office"] containing any of the following keywords: "ICE", "Immigration and Customs Enforcement", "DHS", "Homeland Security", "detention", "processing center", or "[Insert specific LLC name or address]".
Minutes, transcripts, agendas, and notes from any open, closed-door, or executive sessions where the sale, lease, or zoning of the aforementioned property was discussed.

To expedite this request and reduce the administrative burden on your office, I am requesting these records in their native electronic format (e.g., PDF for documents, .PST or .EML for emails) delivered via email or secure download link.
If any part of this request is denied or redacted, please provide a written response citing the specific statutory exemption being applied.
If there are any fees for searching or copying these records, please inform me beforehand if the estimated cost will exceed $25. However, I also request a waiver of all fees, as the disclosure of this information is in the public interest and will contribute significantly to the public’s understanding of local government operations and infrastructure planning.
Thank you for your prompt assistance and public service.
Sincerely,

Ricky Harrershow

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Ricky Harrershow
